lifestyle-levels.description: Base category levels, limits, points, and costs for each lifestyle tier

rows.name: Bolt Hole
rows.notes: +4 threshold to tracking tests. Entertainment: assets only (no services or outings). Cost applies for entire month even if used for a day.

rows.name: Street
rows.notes: Increased levels in C&N, Security, and Neighborhood result in flat increase of 50 nuyen per level per month (not percentage). Assets/services must be GM approved and accessible to general public.

rows.name: Traveler
rows.notes: Points re-rolled each month. Points can be spent on Comforts, Security, or Necessities. Entertainment designed by GM. Only assets and services added by GM (do not add to cost).

rows.name: Commercial
rows.notes: Storefront, not a residence. Rent reduction: Charisma + Etiquette (Corporate) [Social] test each month, each net hit reduces cost by 1,000 nuyen.

neighborhood-zone.description: Neighborhood zone classifications with emergency response times

rows.description: Lawless area deep in barrens. Criminal organizations and gangs. Awakened critters and toxic spirits. Serious disrepair.
Low-rent/industrial districts. SINless squatters and homeless. Heavy or toxic industrial facilities.
Between industrial and residential. Exposure to pollution. Run-down business districts, abandoned warehouses, forgotten tenements.
District has seen better days. Low-rent residences, storage facilities, small bodegas.
Middle class. Commercial places and occasional light industrial.
Luxury-class residences and posh commercial places.
Corporate headquarters. Skyraker condos. Occasional private islands.

rows.name: Armory
rows.effect: Room dedicated to guns. Ammo and one stock firearm (from creation) on hand. With toolkit: 1 point Accuracy or AP repaired per week, 1 point Reach in two weeks.

rows.name: Garage
rows.effect: Large covered area for a single vehicle. Points, cost, and minimum lifestyle depend on vehicle type (see garage-table). With a Shop: 1 box damage repaired/week free. With Facility: 2 boxes/week.

rows.name: Greenhouse
rows.effect: Small plot for growing food. Reduce environmental damage due to food allergies by 1.

rows.name: Grid Subscription
rows.effect: Subscription-based entertainment access. Without it, only the public grid available.

rows.name: Gym
rows.effect: Reduce training time to improve physical stats by 20%.

rows.name: Indoor Arboretum
rows.effect: Room of living vegetation. Bright spot in astral plane. Reduces C&N environmental damage due to pollution allergies by 1.

rows.name: Panic Room
rows.effect: Reinforced 3m x 3m room with structural material (p.197, SR5) and Rating 5 lock.

rows.name: Private Room
rows.effect: Simple 2m x 2m space. Provides concealability (-4 dice pool penalty for Perception Tests to notice a person from outside) and full cover.

rows.name: Shooting Range
rows.effect: Reduce training time with a firearm skill by 10%.

rows.name: Soy Processing Unit
rows.effect: SOTA kitchen devices. Reduce potential environmental damage tied to C&N due to food allergies by 1.

rows.name: Sports Court (Small)
rows.effect: Tennis court, basketball court, bowling alley, etc. Reduces training time with an athletics skill by 10%.

rows.name: Swimming Pool
rows.effect: Small pool for relaxation and exercise. Can be purchased more than once to increase size.

rows.name: Walk-in Freezer
rows.effect: Chilled room for food storage.

rows.name: Workshop/Facility
rows.effect: Space for gear-related work. Must include Commercial lifestyle. Combined with a Shop or Facility, gear/weapons repaired at 1 box/week (2 with Facility) without additional cost.

rows.name: Yard
rows.effect: 50-200 sq meters of outdoor ground. Large enough to park a car, install a ritual circle, etc.

rows.name: Zen Den/Bat Cave
rows.effect: Room dedicated to hobbies. Zen den: +1 dice pool bonus on Interest Knowledge Skills at home. Bat cave: +1 dice pool bonus on Academic Knowledge Skills at home (requires Kit; max 3 Kits).

rows.name: Cleaning Service
rows.effect: Tidying up home and cleaning/mending clothes with privacy guarantee. See cleaning-service-table for costs. Can be purchased multiple times for landscape care, beauty salon/barber, basic car maintenance.

rows.name: Discreet Cleaning Service
rows.effect: Organization patches bullet holes, washes blood stains, cleanses astral in under 24 hours. Handles one body disposal per month. Tied to character, not lifestyle. Does not end when lifestyle changes.

rows.name: Discreet Deliveryman/Candyman
rows.effect: Deliveryman (100/month): legal items, Availability 8 or less. Candyman (1000/month): restricted/illegal items, Availability up to 16. Dice pool 14 for Sneaking, Edge 4. Delivery only; purchase separate.

rows.name: Merchandise: Goods (Specific Item)
rows.effect: Location provides legal goods for sale. Base Availability 3 for gear. Each additional point adds 2 to Availability (max 4 points for luxury-quality). 10% discount on items, reduced Extended Test interval by 1 category.

rows.name: Merchandise: Pawn Shop/Thrift Store
rows.effect: Fence used legal goods. Items sold within a week at 15% of normal purchase price.

rows.name: Merchandise: Used Goods (Specific Item)
rows.effect: Fence one specific item type. Threshold to find buyer halved. Sell immediately at 25% of purchase price.

rows.name: Public Transportation
rows.effect: Monthly pass for bus, trolley, subway, ferry, etc. in region.

rows.name: Railway Pass
rows.effect: Monthly pass for light rail or mag-lev train between two relatively close sprawls. Includes border-crossing fees. Purchased for two city locations.

rows.name: Local Bar Patron
rows.effect: Habitual location (bar, restaurant, fast-food joint). One specific location chosen per purchase.

rows.name: Patron of the Arts
rows.effect: Membership privileges: front-row seats, members-only specials, limited suite or luxury box access. Covers food and drink. See patron-table for costs per type.

garage-table.description: Garage entertainment asset costs by vehicle type

rows.notes: Includes space on a dock and access to launch. Smaller personal watercraft treated same as cars.
Includes access to a helicopter pad to launch the vehicle.

cleaning-service-table.description: Cleaning service monthly costs by sensitivity type

rows.effect: Basic cleaning with reasonable privacy.
Destroys biomaterials. Material link items found at domicile/vehicle are contaminated and cannot be used for ritual purposes.
Uses less harsh chemicals and natural materials. Reduces Fatigue damage from environmental allergies (C&I) by 1.

patron-table.description: Patron of the Arts entertainment outing costs by venue type

lifestyle-options.description: Positive and negative lifestyle options that modify the lifestyle

rows.name: Corporate Owned
rows.effect: Increase C&N value and limit by 1. Increase Security value and limit by 1. Reduce available points by 3.
rows.restrictions: Requires corporate or limited corporate SIN. Base lifestyle must have 3+ points.

rows.name: Extra Secure
rows.effect: No changes from core rulebook. Covers all assets purchased for the lifestyle without additional cost.

rows.name: One Good Thing About This Place
rows.effect: Choose one entertainment asset worth 1 or 2 points. Always available as long as monthly cost is paid.

rows.name: Safehouse
rows.effect: Add +4 to dice pool of anyone trying to track the subject while residing there. Cannot purchase Entertainment assets (other assets can be added). Must obey house rules. Adds 500 nuyen/month.

rows.name: Special Work Area
rows.effect: Applies to a single asset (Garage or Workshop). +2 bonus to Limit for relevant skill tests. 1,000 nuyen/month additional cost per purchase.
rows.restrictions: Can be purchased more than once per lifestyle.

rows.name: Angry Drunk Reputation
rows.effect: Cannot have Bar Patron or Patron of the Arts (Private Club) entertainment options. May cause issues meeting Mr. Johnson. Add 1 point.
rows.restrictions: Bad reputation stays in the neighborhood when character leaves.

rows.name: Cramped
rows.effect: Applies to a single asset (Garage or Workshop). Reduces asset monthly cost by 10%. Limit reduced by 2 for tests in cramped space. Add 1 point.
rows.restrictions: Can be purchased once per asset.

rows.name: Hotel California
rows.effect: Limited window for entering/leaving premises. Rest of time, character is stuck. Lockdown period agreed with GM. Add 1 point.

rows.name: Maid Is Out
rows.effect: Reduce limit of C&N by 1. Cleaning Service cannot be purchased. Increase DV of environmental fatigue by 1 for environmental allergies. Add 1 point.

rows.name: Not A Home
rows.effect: Location not designed for habitation. No plumbing, possibly no privacy. Reduce limit of C&N by 1. Add 1 point.

rows.name: Obscure/Difficult to Find
rows.effect: Cannot have Discreet Deliveryman or Candyman entertainment options. Add 1 point.

rows.name: Safety Third
rows.effect: Reduce number of 1s needed for a glitch by 1 (for tests in the area). Requires Shop or Facility plus Garage or Workshop Asset. Applies to single asset. Add 1 point.
rows.restrictions: Can be taken more than once per asset.

rows.name: Thrifty
rows.effect: Reduce points available by 2 and monthly cost by 1,000 nuyen.

rows.name: W Zone
rows.effect: Location is wilderness, outside any urban area. Grid spotty, power not public. Reduce Neighborhood level by 1. Increase security response by 1D6 hours. Add 1 point.

fashion-by-lifestyle.description: Clothing styles and price ranges for each lifestyle tier

rows.clothing: Cast-off clothes, simple casual/business from industrial polymers (Beaux Retail/Mitsuhama, Kong Walmart)
Wellington Bros (Shiawase Fashion), Vashon Island (Shiawase Fashion), Victory (Ares)
Designer: Berwick (Mortimer of London), Armante (Zoe), Jean-Paul

sample-locations.description: Pre-built sample lifestyle locations with all stats
